title: jurinea consanguinea subsp. bulgarica
intro: Jurinea consanguinea subsp. bulgarica is a plant species belonging to the genus Jurinea, a group of thistle-like plants in the sunflower family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving digestive health. In herbal preparations, Jurinea consanguinea subsp. bulgarica is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
